summary: Good workflow design with elegant parameter resolution and proper action pinning. Python script has clean separation of concerns and strong type hints. However, critical bug at line 169–170: `plan_reasons[clean["id"]]` assumes all artifacts have 'id' field, but _validate() doesn't require it; will KeyError on fixtures lacking 'id'. Workflow error handling is minimal (relies entirely on set -euo pipefail); no explicit checks for missing files. Missing test file prevents validating end-to-end pipeline with act. Recommend fixing ID handling and verifying test fixtures.
